items.title: are you boared?
items.summary: Our company aims to reuse the vast amounts of dry, cardboard waste that comes into Clarks Village every year as packaging. We want to…
items.content_html:
Our company aims to reuse the vast amounts of dry, cardboard waste that comes into Clarks Village every year as packaging.

We want to use it as something which will benefit the community and the village as it comes a long way but is just taken away to be recycled after its first use.
